_comment: Repo-level Claude Code settings for AI-Links. Ships the harness-layer companion for the narrative schema's in-session-capture-triggers. See AGENTS-schema-narrative.json meta.in-session-capture-triggers and Getting-Started-For-Humans.txt section 'SCHEMAS DESCRIBE, HARNESSES ENFORCE'.

hooks.command: echo IN-SESSION CAPTURE REMINDER -- before presenting more than one lane, proposal, decision, reframe, or open question to the human, first materialize those items into narratives/projects/ai-links.json open-threads, known-decisions, or observed-patterns -- render only a citation plus a one-line summary per id -- if you could list more than one uncaptured item from the current session right now, open this turn with a digest pass before new work -- see AGENTS-schema-narrative.json meta.in-session-capture-triggers
